message:
Command `# integration_multiperiph also PASSES! The log just doesn't have "SMOKE_SUMMARY"
# but it has "PASS: smoke sequence completed" 
# Let me verify the status classification more carefully

BUILD_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verification/sim_build"
PASS_COUNT=0
FAIL_COUNT=0

echo "=== Scenario Results ==="
for LOG in "$BUILD_DIR"/*.log; do
  SCENARIO=$(basename "$LOG" .log)
  if grep -qE "PASS: smoke sequence|SEQ: PASS|CONTENTION_DIRECTED: done" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null; then
    if grep -q "errors=[^0]" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null; then
      STATUS="FAIL"
      FAIL_COUNT=$((FAIL_COUNT+1))
    else
      STATUS="PASS"
      PASS_COUNT=$((PASS_COUNT+1))
    fi
  else
    STATUS="FAIL_OR_INCOMPLETE"
    FAIL_COUNT=$((FAIL_COUNT+1))
  fi
  printf "  %-55s %s\n" "$SCENARIO" "$STATUS"
done

echo ""
echo "PASS: $PASS_COUNT  FAIL: $FAIL_COUNT  TOTAL: 21"` executed with exit code 0.
